roa.docketEntryComment: Warrant Discharged
Bench Warrant Issued
PROBATION UPDATED PER AB 1950

/CAL:SENTENCE/TWS/CH3:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1Y /X: ZERO CTS/CTORD:1 YEARCJ SENTENCE IS STAYED PENDING SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF  30 DAY RESIDENTIALALCOHOL TREATMENT PROGRAM AT RECOVERY MANAGEMENT SERVICES IN CONCORD & THEFOLLOW UP INDIVIDUAL OUTPATIENT PLAN REQUIRED BY THE PROGRAM/X:IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLETE THE PROGRAM OR THE FOLLOW UP IOP, DEFENDANT WILL BE REMANDED TO SERVE THE 1Y CJ SENTENCE & WILL NOT RECEIVE ANY CRDIT FOR THE TIMESPENT IN THE PROGRAM, THE 1Y CJ SENTENCE WILL BE SERVED CONSECUTIVELY TO 1Y CJ SENTENCE IN #18014125/OR/CTORD:REPORT TO RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM UPON RELEASE FROM CUSTODY/WS/WEAP/RESTR/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/X:PROBATION SENTENCE IN THIS CASE IS TO RUN CONCURRENT WITH #18014125/ /SA1:CHRISTINE VIDALI & JEFFREY VIDALI/SA2:698 14TH STREET SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114/SAORD3/SAORD/CTORD:CRIMINAL PROTECTIVE ORDER TO REMAIN IN EFFECT FOR 10 YEARS TO  EXPIRE ON 03-13-29/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/REMA/DOP/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT RE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/
/CAL:$150K BW STAY FR 02-05-19/BWLIFT:02-05-19/X:BW BAIL AMOUNT IS MODIFIED AT REQUEST OF THE PEOPLE,/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:250000/X: 3 OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL:PHC/CONTD PROC RE BW;/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND     STAYED TO 02-14-19/X: BAIL SET AT $150,000/DOP/
/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/X:PROOF OF PARTICIPATION IN PROGRAM WAS PROVIDEDTO THE COURT BY DEFENSE COUNSEL,/CONT/X:DEFENDANT IS ORDERED PRESENT UNLESS IN PROGRAM/
/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT ON PROGRAM/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT IS PROGRAM COMPLIANT,/X:FUTURE HEARING DATE OF 12-12-18 IS CONFIRMED,/X:DEFENDANT'S APPEARANCE ISWAIVED IF IN PROGRAM,/
/CAL:PROGRESS REPORT ON PROGRAM/DAWT/X:DEFENDANT IN PROGRAM/VD:HEARING SCHEDULED ON 11-14-18/CONT/DAWF/X:UNLESS DEFENDANT IS NOT IN PROGRAM, DEFENDANT ORDERED PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/OR/CTORD:DEFENDANT MUST REPORT TO AND COMPLETETHE CIRCLE LODGE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM IN UTAH/CTORD:DO NOT CONSUME ALCOHOL, MARIJUANA OR ANY NARCOTIC NOT PRESCRIBED TO THE DEFENDANT/SA1:CHRISTINE VIDALI, JEFFREY VIDALI/SA2:698 14TH ST, SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:PROGRESS REPORT ON PROGRAM ON 10-26 & 11-14-18/DAWF/
/CAL:PROG RPT RE RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM/DAWT/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:NO FUTURE PROGRESS REPORTS REQUIRED    /
/CAL:PROG RPT RE RES TX PRGM/DAWT/DOPU:IN RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT PROGRAM//CONT/
/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OFNL/DEFT ADV NL: 3 & 5/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PHC/X:LOVE WAIVER/CONTD TO SET OR DISPO, DOP /CONTD:TO SET OR DISPOSE/DOP/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/BAIL:250,000/X:LOVE WAIVER/CONTD:PRE-HEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
